fullName:
com.blockether.spel.daemon-cdp-discovery-test.Unit tests for the `/mnt/`-path detector used to decide whether a
   DevToolsActivePort file came from a Windows-side Chrome and therefore
   needs host resolution beyond loopback..returns true for /mnt/ paths (WSL projection)./mnt/c/Users/alice/AppData/... (Chrome on Windows C: drive)
name:
Unit tests for the `/mnt/`-path detector used to decide whether a
   DevToolsActivePort file came from a Windows-side Chrome and therefore
   needs host resolution beyond loopback. > returns true for /mnt/ paths (WSL projection) > /mnt/c/Users/alice/AppData/... (Chrome on Windows C: drive)
